query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS network_benefits (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  benefitType ENUM('insurance', 'retirement', 'legal', 'accounting', 'marketing', 'software', 'training', 'other') NOT NULL,
  provider VARCHAR(255),
  monthlyCost DECIMAL(10,2),
  minimumTier ENUM('basic', 'professional', 'enterprise') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'basic',
  minimumTenureMonths INT DEFAULT 0,
  isActive BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  enrollmentUrl VARCHAR(500),
  contactEmail VARCHAR(255),
  contactPhone VARCHAR(50),
  notes TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
)
